title: UPGB Financial Literacy Counselor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
short_info: Uttar Pradesh Gramin Bank has released the official Financial Literacy Counselor Notification 2026 at UPGB Official Website. Eligible candidates with a maximum age limit of 65 years and a Graduate degree from a recognized university along with relevant banking/financial sector experience can apply offline until 06-06-2026. The official notification PDF and application link are available below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 65 years at the time of appointment
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit: 65 years at the time of appointment.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degree from a recognized university.
qualification.details: Graduate degree from a recognized university. Preference to candidates with Master's degree in Agriculture, Veterinary Science, Sociology, Psychology, Social Work. Proficiency in local language. Interest in teaching and knowledge of computer operations. Good knowledge of banking, insurance, investment, pension, law and finance. Excellent communication, team building and problem-solving skills. Minimum 5 years of experience in any of the following: Former banker with at least 5 years of work experience in a nationalized bank or Regional Rural Bank (RRB). Person with at least 5 years of experience in Banking/related fields, NBFCs, or financial institutions. Person with at least 5 years of experience as a Business Correspondent (BC) or BC Coordinator. Minimum 3 years of experience as Director in RSETI, or minimum 5 years of experience as Faculty member.

salary_details.details: Fixed honorarium of Rs. 15,000/- and other miscellaneous expenses up to Rs. 3,000/-.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for UPGB Financial Literacy Counselor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: http://www.upgb.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the UPGB Financial Literacy Counselor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Financial Literacy Counselor position at Uttar Pradesh Gramin Bank is 06 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree from a recognized university. A Master's degree in specific fields is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Financial Literacy Counselor role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for this position is 65 years at the time of appointment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Financial Literacy Counselor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a fixed honorarium of Rs. 15,000/- along with miscellaneous expenses up to Rs. 3,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the UPGB Financial Literacy Counselor recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline by sending the duly filled application form along with required documents to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any experience required for this post?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 5 years of experience in banking, financial institutions, or as a Business Correspondent is required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection of candidates for the Financial Literacy Counselor post will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Uttar Pradesh Gramin Bank.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Financial Literacy Counselor position is offered on a contract basis.
